description: Scraped job posting — no salary mentioned, salary_* must all be null
subject: Staff Engineer – Platform, Zalando SE
raw_text:
Staff Engineer – Platform
Zalando SE | Berlin, Germany | Full-time | Hybrid

About the role:
We are looking for a Staff Engineer to join our Platform Engineering team. You will architect and build the foundational systems that power Zalando's e-commerce platform at scale.

Requirements:
- 8+ years of software engineering experience
- Deep expertise in distributed systems
- Strong background in Golang or Java
- Experience with Kubernetes and cloud-native architectures (AWS preferred)
- Experience leading technical projects across teams

We do not publish salary information publicly. Compensation is competitive and discussed during the interview process.

Apply: https://jobs.zalando.com/en/jobs/staff-engineer-platform
